mission.name: Artemis II
mission.status: Launch countdown — T-25h — all systems GO

leaders.temp_accuracy: Open-Meteo leads early (0.3C avg), KSEA improving in afternoon
leaders.wind_accuracy: NWS best morning, KSEA best afternoon (both calm)
leaders.overall: 10 samples collected. Afternoon warming to 11.1C. Very dry air (spread 13.9C).

announcements.text: v1.0.14: T-25h 2pm. Peak 11.1C holding. Kp 0.67 very quiet. Pressure dropping. Radio guide expanded with 4 station profiles (C89.5, KEXP, KISW, KISM).
v1.0.13: T-26h 1pm. 11.1C peak. Variable wind. Kp dropped to 0.67.
v1.0.12: Noon. Zulu timeclock. Paine Field + Salish Sea pages.
v1.0.8: Warming fast 9.4C. Whidbey + Germain + history pages.
